items.question: What is Qoves?
items.answer: Qoves is a platform focused on helping people improve their appearance and facial aesthetics using science-based, non-surgical methods through personalized facial analysis and transformation plans.

items.question: Who is this for?
items.answer: Qoves is for anyone who wants to improve their looks using science-based methods without surgery.

items.question: What exactly will I receive?
items.answer: Users receive a comprehensive facial analysis, personalized glow-up protocol, biometric scores, before-and-after visualizations, an aesthetic letter, and messaging access to the care team.

items.question: Can’t I just do this with Chat GPT or Claude?
items.answer: AI assistants can provide general guidance, but they cannot perform detailed facial landmarking, biometric analysis, or personalized recommendations like Qoves proprietary systems and experts.

items.question: How long will it take for me to receive my results?
items.answer: Results are delivered within up to 28 days after photo upload.

items.question: How does it work?
items.answer: Users answer questions, upload six photos, and receive a personalized analysis and improvement protocol within 28 days.

items.question: Is this a one-time report or a continuous service?
items.answer: It is a continuous yearly subscription service with updated analyses, protocols, visualizations, and ongoing support.

items.question: How often do I need to submit photos?
items.answer: Once a year for updated analysis and progress tracking.

items.question: What makes Qoves different from beauty apps or filters?
items.answer: Qoves emphasizes precise measurements, realistic visualizations, and evidence-based recommendations tailored to the individual.

items.question: Are the recommendations expensive?
items.answer: Qoves provides recommendations across different budgets, including affordable alternatives.

items.question: Do I have to follow everything perfectly for it to work?
items.answer: No. Following most of the protocol should still lead to noticeable improvements.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Users sign up on the website, complete payment, create an account, answer questionnaires, and upload photos.

items.question: Do I need to upload special photos?
items.answer: Users need to upload six clear photos from different angles. No special equipment is required.

items.question: Do I have to download an app?
items.answer: No. Qoves works directly in the browser on desktop and mobile.

items.question: Can I use this on mobile?
items.answer: Yes. The entire experience is mobile-optimized.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Qoves costs $150 per year.

items.question: What’s included in the analysis?
items.answer: The analysis includes facial analysis, glow-up protocol, biometric scores, visualizations, and an aesthetic letter.

items.question: Is it a one-time payment or subscription?
items.answer: It is a yearly subscription.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. Users can cancel or pause anytime from account settings.

items.question: Will my photos and data be kept private?
items.answer: Yes. Data is encrypted, securely stored, and only accessible to essential staff.

items.question: Is my information safe?
items.answer: Yes. Qoves follows strict privacy and data protection protocols.

items.question: Can I delete my account and all my data?
items.answer: Yes. Users can request complete data deletion from account settings.

items.question: Is wanting to improve your appearance toxic?
items.answer: Qoves states that self-improvement in appearance is similar to improving health, finances, or relationships.

items.question: Will this make me feel worse about yourself?
items.answer: Qoves aims to provide clarity, reduce uncertainty, and help users feel more confident.

items.question: Do I really need this to look better?
items.answer: Qoves says independent research can help, but their platform makes the process easier and more effective.

items.question: Isn’t this promoting toxic beauty standards?
items.answer: Qoves focuses on natural, healthy-looking improvements while preserving unique facial characteristics.

items.question: I’ve had cosmetic procedures before—will this still work?
items.answer: Yes. Qoves tailors recommendations based on previous procedures.

items.question: I don’t want surgery—can this still help me?
items.answer: Yes. Qoves specializes in non-surgical improvements.

items.question: I live outside the US—can I still use Qoves?
items.answer: Yes. The service is fully online and available worldwide.

items.question: I don’t know anything about facial aesthetics—is that okay?
items.answer: Yes. Qoves is designed to be accessible even for beginners.

items.question: Can I really talk to your team?
items.answer: Yes. Users can message the aesthetic team anytime through the dashboard.

items.question: What if a recommendation doesn’t work for me?
items.answer: Qoves can adjust protocols with alternatives.

items.question: How can I contact Qoves if I need help?
items.answer: Users can contact via dashboard, email, or live chat.

items.question: Will I get support from a real person or just AI?
items.answer: Support is always provided by real people.

items.question: How quickly do you respond to questions?
items.answer: Usually within 24 hours, often faster.

items.question: Can someone help me understand my results?
items.answer: Yes. The team can explain results and next steps.

items.question: Still unsure?
items.answer: Users can email inquiry@qoves.com for additional help.
